At A Glance

  • Name: Thomas Nyarko Hayford
  • Current role: Hubtel relationship leadership roles (progressed to Relationship Manager in March 2025)
  • Founder: Iderwell
  • Location context: Born in Obuasi, Ghana
  • Education: St. John's School - Sekondi (2009-2013), then University of Cape Coast from 2014

Focused on relationship quality, operational consistency, and sustainable business growth.

Working Style

  • Clarity first: define the real business issue before proposing solutions.
  • Execution rhythm: build simple routines teams can sustain without friction.
  • Relationship depth: consistent support and trust are treated as growth assets.
